summary: Iteration 19 - Advanced Ping Metrics Testing. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Fixed critical frontend bug (hasPingStats temporal dead zone). Fixed backend bug (metrics history missing ping fields). All new features working: device-report accepts ping_stats/open_ports/http_details, reset-update-status endpoint works, metrics history stores ping data.

minor.issue: FIXED - Was missing ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss in projection. Added these fields.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - 'Cannot access hasPingStats before initialization' error. Variable was used in useEffect before being defined.

device_report_endpoint: POST /api/connector/device-report accepts all advanced fields together
device_metrics_history: GET /api/connector/device-metrics/{ip} stores and returns ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss
vault_regression: GET /api/connector/vault/credentials returns decrypted credentials with API key

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: DeviceDetailPanel.js had temporal dead zone issue - hasPingStats was used in useEffect before being defined. Moved variable definitions before useEffect.
FIXED: server.py device-metrics endpoint was missing ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss in MongoDB projection. Added these fields.
Backend correctly stores ping_stats, open_ports, http_details in device_poll_status collection
Backend correctly stores ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss in device_metrics_history collection
Reset update status endpoint correctly clears stuck update states
5-minute timeout for stuck updates is implemented in heartbeat endpoint
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2849-2852: added ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss to metrics projection)
seed_data_creation: Test devices created during testing (192.168.99.1-5) were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced ping metrics features fully tested. Backend accepts ping_stats, open_ports, http_details in device-report. Metrics history stores ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss. Frontend DeviceDetailPanel correctly renders all advanced ping metrics (Latenza, Jitter, Packet Loss, TTL, DNS, HTTP, Stato). Reset update status endpoint works for admin. Two bugs were fixed: 1) Frontend hasPingStats temporal dead zone error, 2) Backend metrics history missing ping fields in projection. All regression tests pass (vault, redfish, power control).

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Variable hasPingStats was used in useEffect dependency array (line 175) before being defined (line 183). This is a temporal dead zone issue with const declarations.
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved all derived variable definitions (hw, fw, rf, ps, op, hd, hasPingStats) before the useEffect hook.

bugs_fixed.issue: GET /api/connector/device-metrics/{device_ip} not returning ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss
bugs_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB projection in line 2851 was missing these fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Added ping_avg, ping_jitter, packet_loss to the projection: {"_id": 0, "timestamp": 1, "cpu_usage": 1, "memory_usage": 1, "temperature": 1, "active_sessions": 1, "vpn_throughput": 1, "ping_avg": 1, "ping_jitter": 1, "packet_loss": 1}

feature_verification.feature: Advanced Ping Metrics for PING-monitored devices
new_fields_in_device_report: ping_stats: {min, avg, max, jitter, packet_loss, ttl, dns_ms}
http_details: {status_code, response_ms, server_header, title, content_type, ssl_expiry, ssl_issuer}
frontend_ui_elements: Packet Loss (ping-loss): Shows packet loss percentage
TTL (ping-ttl): Shows TTL with OS detection hint
HTTP (ping-http): Shows HTTP status code and response time
HTTP Details section: Server header, page title, content type, response time
SSL Certificate section: Expiry date with color coding (red if <30 days), issuer
Open Ports section: Badge list of open ports
feature_verification.reset_update_status_endpoint: POST /api/connector/{id}/reset-update-status - Clears stuck update status (admin only)
